values: Tyonte brings extensive babysitting experience as the oldest of six and a clear passion for working with children. She demonstrates solid conflict resolution skills and flexible scheduling around her upcoming school commitments, making her a promising candidate for substitute teaching roles.

Hi. My name is tan SI Matthews. I have multiple years of babysitting experience, as I am the oldest of six. I also have babysitting experience outside of the family. I've always been in. I've always enjoyed being around kids and babies. And I think I would be a great substitute teacher.
I live in Sandy Springs. Georgia. I'm willing to travel between 15 to 20 miles per hour shifts.

I'm willing to work. Part-time Monday through Friday, as of right now, I'm in the process of starting school bag. So when I start school back, I will only be available after 4:00. But as of right now, I have opened availability Monday to Friday.

If there was a conflict in the classroom between two students, and one child hit another one. I will calmly sit them down and explain to them. That hurting others is not okay and that you should keep hands feet and other objects to yourself.
I will make a great up kid teacher because I have years of experience, I've learned how to resolve conflicts between kids of all ages and I feel like I can be really great with kids.
